name: get_supplier
description: Retrieve supplier details including name, contact information, rating, and status.

supplier_id.description: The unique identifier of the supplier to retrieve.

supplier_name.description: The name of the supplier to search for if the ID is unknown.

name: get_supplier_kb
description: Search supplier knowledge base documents for relevant information using semantic retrieval.

query.description: The search query to find relevant supplier documents and policies.
